evidence: Only an oath/attachment worksheet is available; no USCIS interview record or immigration record check addressing testimony truthfulness.
explanation: No source in the inventory addresses whether the applicant gave false testimony to obtain an immigration benefit. The oath worksheet's closed-world scope covers only oath willingness and attachment determination, not testimony veracity. A false binding would require a uscis_interview_record or immigration_record_check with relevant coverage, which is absent.
